name: WorkOS
description: WorkOS provides enterprise-ready authentication and identity infrastructure. It handles Single Sign-On (SSO), Directory Sync (SCIM), Audit Logs, Admin Portal, user management via AuthKit, and organization management for B2B SaaS applications.

capabilities.name: sso_authorize
capabilities.description: Generate an SSO authorization URL to redirect the user to their identity provider.

capabilities.name: sso_profile_get
capabilities.description: Exchange an authorization code for user profile and access token after SSO callback.

capabilities.name: connections_list
capabilities.description: List all SSO connections. Filter by organization or connection type.

capabilities.name: connections_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a single SSO connection.

capabilities.name: connections_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an SSO connection.

capabilities.name: directories_list
capabilities.description: List all directory sync connections.

capabilities.name: directories_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single directory by ID.

capabilities.name: directories_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a directory sync connection.

capabilities.name: directory_users_list
capabilities.description: List users from a directory sync connection.

capabilities.name: directory_users_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single directory user.

capabilities.name: directory_groups_list
capabilities.description: List groups from a directory sync connection.

capabilities.name: directory_groups_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single directory group.

capabilities.name: organizations_list
capabilities.description: List all organizations in your WorkOS environment.

capabilities.name: organizations_create
capabilities.description: Create a new organization representing a customer company.

capabilities.name: organizations_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single organization by ID.

capabilities.name: organizations_update
capabilities.description: Update an organization's name or domains.

capabilities.name: organizations_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an organization.

capabilities.name: audit_log_events_create
capabilities.description: Create an audit log event to track user activity for compliance.

capabilities.name: audit_log_exports_create
capabilities.description: Create an export of audit log events for a date range.

capabilities.name: audit_log_exports_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the status and download URL of an audit log export.

capabilities.name: user_management_users_list
capabilities.description: List all users managed by AuthKit.

capabilities.name: user_management_users_create
capabilities.description: Create a new user in AuthKit.

capabilities.name: user_management_users_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single AuthKit user by ID.

capabilities.name: user_management_users_update
capabilities.description: Update an AuthKit user.

capabilities.name: user_management_users_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an AuthKit user.

capabilities.name: user_management_authenticate
capabilities.description: Authenticate a user with password, magic auth, or OAuth code.

capabilities.name: user_management_magic_auth_send
capabilities.description: Send a magic auth code to a user's email for passwordless login.

capabilities.name: user_management_email_verification_send
capabilities.description: Send an email verification code to a user.

capabilities.name: user_management_email_verification_confirm
capabilities.description: Confirm email verification with the code sent to the user.

capabilities.name: user_management_password_reset_send
capabilities.description: Send a password reset email to a user.

capabilities.name: user_management_password_reset_confirm
capabilities.description: Reset a user's password using the reset token.

capabilities.name: organization_memberships_list
capabilities.description: List organization memberships for a user or organization.

capabilities.name: organization_memberships_create
capabilities.description: Add a user to an organization with a role.

capabilities.name: organization_memberships_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a user from an organization.
